ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the region */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the recorded data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the recorded data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* The month of the recorded data */,
  "day" INTEGER /* The day of the recorded data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "long_" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Total active cases */,
  "combined_key" TEXT /* Combined key for region identification */,
  "incidence_rate" REAL /* Incidence rate of COVID-19 cases per 100,000 people */,
  "case_fatality_ratio" REAL /* Case fatality ratio (deaths/confirmed cases) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is vaccinated */,
  "testing_rate" REAL /* Number of tests conducted per 100,000 people */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of tests that are positive */,
  "hospitalizations" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalizations */,
  "icu_admissions" INTEGER /* Number of ICU admissions */,
  "ventilator_use" INTEGER /* Number of patients on ventilators */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips", "date")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code representing the region */,
  "admin2" TEXT /* Name of the administrative division */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Name of the province or state */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "long_" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "combined_key" TEXT /* Combined key for region identification */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fips")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the update */,
  "date" TEXT /* The date of the recorded statistics */,
  "total_confirmed" INTEGER /* Total confirmed cases on that date */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total deaths on that date */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total recovered cases on that date */,
  "total_active" INTEGER /* Total active cases on that date */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on that date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on that date */,
  "new_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries reported on that date */,
  "new_active" INTEGER /* Number of new active cases reported on that date */,
  "testing_total" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted on that date */,
  "positive_tests" INTEGER /* Number of positive tests on that date */,
  "testing_positive_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests on that date */,
  "vaccinations_total" INTEGER /* Total number of vaccinations administered on that date */,
  "vaccinations_first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered on that date */,
  "vaccinations_second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "request_url" TEXT /* URL of the request made */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* HTTP status code of the response */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Time taken to process the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
